TextView.android:text:
Nutrition Guide

1. Eat a Balanced Diet
Include proteins, carbs, fats, and vitamins daily.

2. Include More Vegetables
Aim for at least 3 servings of veggies per day.

3. Choose Whole Grains
Swap white rice and bread for whole grain options.

4. Limit Processed Foods
Avoid packaged snacks high in salt and sugar.

5. Eat Healthy Fats
Avocados, nuts, and olive oil support brain health.

6. Don't Skip Breakfast
A nutritious breakfast fuels your body for the day.

7. Control Portion Sizes
Eating the right amount prevents overeating.

8. Add More Protein
Eggs, beans, and lean meat help build and repair muscle.

9. Reduce Sugar Intake
Too much sugar leads to energy crashes and weight gain.

10. Plan Your Meals
Meal prepping helps you make healthier food choices.
